response.justification: Strong senior IC with broad technical experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems, plus solid Linux/open-source background and some teaching/workshop experience. However, the role explicitly requires German C1 (candidate only has Basic German) and demands proven leadership of teams, which is not clearly evidenced in the resume — most roles are individual contributor positions. UML and formal architecture/requirements-management experience are also not explicitly demonstrated.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering experience across many domains including Linux and open-source ecosystems
Founder/maintainer of open-source GIS platform shows architectural ownership and long-term project stewardship
Demonstrated mentoring through workshops, courses, and code katas
concerns: German proficiency listed as Basic, well below the required C1 level
No clear evidence of formal team leadership or head-of-development responsibilities
UML, requirements management, and formal IT security/compliance experience not demonstrated

key_factors.factor: German language gap (Basic vs C1 required)
Limited explicit leadership/team management track record
